original_statement: which team did the badgers play first this season?
mutated_statement: which team did the primary squad play first this season if the opener was required to occur after the season ended?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Conditional/temporal constraint addition + Logical contradiction: "the badgers" → "the primary squad" (specific team name → generic descriptor) | added clause "if the opener was required to occur after the season ended" (introduces a hypothetical temporal constraint that conflicts with "this season")

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 合理化矛盾指令（逻辑解释合理化）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中的关键信息（“常规赛于11月24日结束……11月24日之后的第一场是12月1日的Big Ten Championship对阵内布拉斯加”），agent没有拒绝或请求澄清，也未指出语义自相矛盾，而是把增添的时间约束作为假设前提，重新定义“opener”为“赛季结束之后的第一场比赛”，并基于事实数据推断出答案“Nebraska”。其表现特征是识别到矛盾或不现实的要求后，通过逻辑推理和事实检索将矛盾条件合理化为可执行的假设情景并给出结论。因此归类为“合理化矛盾指令”下的“逻辑解释合理化”。
